title: nastanthus agglomeratus var. gilliesii
intro: Nastanthus agglomeratus var. gilliesii is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the common or narrow-leaved nastanthus. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in South America, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nastanthus agglomeratus var. gilliesii include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically dried and used to make infusions, decoctions, and teas, which are taken to harness its medicinal properties.
